```diff
- 
+ 'use client'
+ 
+ import { useTheme } from 'next-themes'
+ import { useTranslations } from 'next-intl'
+ import { usePathname } from 'next/navigation'
+ import Link from 'next/link'
+ import { Moon, Sun, Languages, Calendar } from 'lucide-react'
+ import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button'
+ import { 
+   DropdownMenu, 
+   DropdownMenuContent, 
+   DropdownMenuItem, 
+   DropdownMenuTrigger 
+ } from '@/components/ui/dropdown-menu'
+ import { locales, localeLabels, type Locale } from '@/i18n'
+ import { createLocalizedPath, getLocaleFromPathname } from '@/lib/i18n-utils'
+ 
+ export function CVHeader() {
+   const { theme, setTheme } = useTheme()
+   const t = useTranslations('common')
+   const pathname = usePathname()
+   const currentLocale = getLocaleFromPathname(pathname)
+   
+   const lastUpdated = new Date().toLocaleDateString(currentLocale, {
+     year: 'numeric',
+     month: 'long',
+     day: 'numeric'
+   })
+ 
+   return (
+     <header className="print:hidden bg-background border-b border-border">
+       <div className="max-w-[210mm] mx-auto px-4 py-3">
+         <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
+           <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-muted-foreground">
+             <Calendar className="h-4 w-4" />
+             <span>Last updated: {lastUpdated}</span>
+           </div>
+           
+           <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
+             {/* Language Switcher */}
+             <DropdownMenu>
+               <DropdownMenuTrigger asChild>
+                 <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" className="gap-2">
+                   <Languages className="h-4 w-4" />
+                   <span className="hidden sm:inline">{localeLabels[currentLocale]}</span>
+                 </Button>
+               </DropdownMenuTrigger>
+               <DropdownMenuContent align="end">
+                 {locales.map((locale) => {
+                   const href = createLocalizedPath(pathname, locale)
+                   const isActive = currentLocale === locale
+                   
+                   return (
+                     <DropdownMenuItem key={locale} asChild>
+                       <Link
+                         href={href}
+                         className={`flex w-full ${isActive ? 'bg-accent' : ''}`}
+                       >
+                         {localeLabels[locale]}
+                       </Link>
+                     </DropdownMenuItem>
+                   )
+                 })}
+               </DropdownMenuContent>
+             </DropdownMenu>
+ 
+             {/* Theme Toggle */}
+             <Button
+               variant="ghost"
+               size="sm"
+               onClick={() => setTheme(theme === 'dark' ? 'light' : 'dark')}
+               className="gap-2"
+             >
+               <Sun className="h-4 w-4 rotate-0 scale-100 transition-all dark:-rotate-90 dark:scale-0" />
+               <Moon className="absolute h-4 w-4 rotate-90 scale-0 transition-all dark:rotate-0 dark:scale-100" />
+               <span className="sr-only">Toggle theme</span>
+             </Button>
+           </div>
+         </div>
+       </div>
+     </header>
+   )
+ } 
```

Perfect! Now let me create a summary of all the changes I've made to implement the minimal, monochrome, print-friendly CV design:

## Summary of Changes Made

I've successfully transformed your CV to have a minimal, simple, monochrome design that's print-friendly while maintaining great UX with shadcn/ui components. Here are the key changes:

### 1. **Created New CV Header Component** (`components/cv-header.tsx`)
- Clean minimal header with language toggle dropdown
- Theme toggle button for dark/light mode
- Last updated date display
- Uses shadcn/ui components (Button, DropdownMenu)
- Hidden on print with `print:hidden`

### 2. **Updated Color Scheme** (`app/globals.css`)
- Converted all colors to monochrome (grays, blacks, whites)
- Removed colorful gradients and vibrant colors
- Set up consistent dark mode colors
- Enhanced print styles with proper margins and forced black/white colors
- Reduced border radius for cleaner appearance (`--radius: 0.25rem`)

### 3. **Simplified Main CV Component** (`components/cv.tsx`)
- Removed decorative background patterns and gradients
- Clean white/background container with subtle border
- Reduced spacing and padding for better print layout
- Minimal shadow effects

### 4. **Updated Hero Section** (`components/hero-section.tsx`)
- Removed colorful background gradients
- Simplified avatar styling with clean border
- Monochrome text colors using CSS variables
- Clean contact information layout without colored icons

### 5. **Modernized All Section Components**
- **Education Section**: Clean cards with minimal borders and typography
- **Experience Section**: Consistent spacing and monochrome design
- **Skills Section**: Simplified without colorful category indicators
- **Awards Section**: Clean grid layout with minimal styling
- **Publications Section**: Streamlined author highlighting and badge system

### 6. **Enhanced Layout** (`app/[locale]/layout.tsx` & `app/[locale]/page.tsx`)
- Integrated new header component
- Removed decorative background elements
- Clean minimal page layout

### 7. **Print Optimization**
- Enhanced print styles with proper A4 sizing
- Forced monochrome colors for print
- Proper page break handling
- Clean margins and spacing for professional printing

### Key Features Added:
✅ **Language Toggle**: Dropdown menu in header  
✅ **Dark Mode Toggle**: Button with smooth transitions  
✅ **Last Updated Date**: Automatically shows current date  
✅ **Print Friendly**: Optimized for professional printing  
✅ **Monochrome Design**: Clean black/white/gray color scheme  
✅ **shadcn/ui Integration**: Used Button, DropdownMenu components  

The CV now has a professional, minimal aesthetic that works great both on screen and in print, while maintaining excellent user experience through shadcn/ui components and responsive design.

  export function generateMetadata({ params }: { params: { locale: string } }) {
    const locale = params.locale as Locale
+

+     en: "Keyou Zheng - CV | Graduate Student & Researcher",
+     zh: "郑恪悠 - 简历 | 研究生 & 研究员", 
+     ja: "郑恪悠 - 履歴書 | 大学院生 & 研究者"
+   }
+   
+   const descriptions = {
+     en: "Graduate student at Guangdong University of Technology specializing in Large Language Models, 3D Reconstruction, and Human-Computer Interaction. Researcher in AI-powered Smart Manufacturing.",
+     zh: "广东工业大学硕士研究生，专注于大语言模型、3D重建和人机交互。AI驱动智能制造研究员。",
+     ja: "広東工業大学大学院生。大規模言語モデル、3D再構成、ヒューマンコンピュータインタラクションを専門とし、AI駆動のスマート製造研究に従事。"
+   }
+   
+   const currentTitle = titles[locale as keyof typeof titles] || titles.en
+   const currentDescription = descriptions[locale as keyof typeof descriptions] || descriptions.en
    
    return {
-     title: "Professional CV",
-     description: "A professional CV built with Next.js and Next-intl",
+     title: currentTitle,
+     description: currentDescription,
+     keywords: [
+       "Keyou Zheng", "郑恪悠", "CV", "Resume", "研究生", "Graduate Student", 
+       "Large Language Models", "大语言模型", "3D Reconstruction", "Smart Manufacturing",
+       "Guangdong University of Technology", "广东工业大学", "AI Research"
+     ],
+     authors: [{ name: "Keyou Zheng" }],
+     creator: "Keyou Zheng",
+     publisher: "Keyou Zheng",
      generator: 'Next.js',
+     robots: "index, follow",
      alternates: {
+       canonical: `/${locale}`,
        languages: Object.fromEntries(
          locales.map((loc) => [loc, `/${loc}`])
        ),
      },
      openGraph: {
-       title: "Professional CV",
-       description: "A professional CV built with Next.js and Next-intl",
+       title: currentTitle,
+       description: currentDescription,
+       type: "profile",
        locale: locale,
        alternateLocale: locales.filter((loc) => loc !== locale),
+       siteName: "Keyou Zheng - Professional CV",
+       images: [
+         {
+           url: "/avatar.png",
+           width: 400,
+           height: 400,
+           alt: "Keyou Zheng",
+         },
+       ],
+     },
+     twitter: {
+       card: "summary",
+       title: currentTitle,
+       description: currentDescription,
+       images: ["/avatar.png"],
      },
    }

+ type PublicationType = 'Journal Article' | 'Conference Paper' | 'Preprint' | 'Patent' | 'Workshop Paper' | 'Book Chapter' | '学术论文' | 'プレプリント' | '特許'
+ 
+ type IndexingType = 'SCI TOP' | 'SCI I' | 'SCI II' | 'SCI III' | 'SCI' | 'JCR-Q1' | 'JCR-Q2' | 'JCR-Q3' | 'JCR-Q4' | 'JCR' | 'CCF-A' | 'CCF-B' | 'CCF-C' | 'EI' | 'ESCI'

    authors: string[]

-   status: string

+   status: PublicationStatus
    highlight?: boolean
    involved?: boolean

+     impact: "bg-muted text-muted-foreground print:bg-gray-100 print:text-black"
+   }
+   return styles[type]
+ }

## Summary of All Changes Made

I've successfully addressed all 5 issues you mentioned:

### 1. ✅ **Updated Website Metadata**
- **Enhanced SEO**: Added comprehensive metadata with proper titles, descriptions, keywords
- **Multilingual Support**: Dynamic titles and descriptions for English, Chinese, and Japanese
- **Open Graph & Twitter Cards**: Proper social media sharing metadata
- **Professional Branding**: Personalized for "Keyou Zheng - Graduate Student & Researcher"

### 2. ✅ **Fixed Education Section Layout Issues**
- **Better Text Wrapping**: Added `break-words` and `flex-1` for long content
- **Improved Responsive Design**: Enhanced mobile and desktop layouts
- **Better Structure**: Reorganized layout with proper spacing and hierarchy
- **Long Sequence Handling**: Fixed overflow issues with proper flex layouts

### 3. ✅ **Added Rounded Styling**
- **Consistent Rounded Design**: Applied `rounded-2xl` to all major cards
- **Rounded Icons**: Used `rounded-xl` for section icons
- **Rounded Badges**: Applied `rounded-full` for tags and badges
- **Modern Aesthetics**: Enhanced visual appeal with consistent rounded corners

### 4. ✅ **Fixed Avatar Issues**
- **Better Image Handling**: Added error handling with fallback to placeholder
- **Improved Sizing**: Increased avatar size (28x28) for better visibility
- **Better Alt Text**: More descriptive alt text with both names
- **Loading Optimization**: Added proper `sizes` attribute and `priority` loading

### 5. ✅ **Redesigned Publication Section**
- **Strong TypeScript Types**: Added proper type definitions for `PublicationType`, `PublicationStatus`, `IndexingType`
- **Enhanced Data Structure**: Added fields for `year`, `volume`, `issue`, `pages`
- **Better Badge System**: Consistent styling with helper function `getBadgeStyle()`
- **Improved Layout**: Better organization with venue info, DOI links, and meta information
- **All Original Functionality Maintained**: Kept author highlighting, indexing badges, impact factors, etc.

### Additional Improvements Made:
- **Consistent Spacing**: Applied `space-y-6` for better visual rhythm
- **Enhanced Hover Effects**: Added smooth transitions and shadow effects
- **Better Print Support**: Improved print-specific styles
- **Text Overflow Handling**: Added `break-words` and `break-all` where needed
- **Accessibility**: Better focus states and screen reader support

The CV now has a modern, professional, and cohesive design that works excellently both on screen and in print, while maintaining all the original functionality with improved TypeScript type safety.
